title: Add support for $srandom()
body:
There are some designs that use the non-standard `$srandom()` system task that we would like to simulate in Verilator. Before we start implementing this feature we would like to ask if you will be ok with merging this feature.
This function is used for seeding the RNG. A related non-standard function for retrieving the seed (`$get_initial_random_seed()`) is already [supported by Verilator](https://verilator.org/guide/latest/extensions.html#cmdoption-arg-get_initial_random_seed).
